properties.Test Case: Using above SL book, add image descriptions to images. Examine ePUB. Then check them in Simply Reading and another ePUB reader. [Note: to load news books into the Simply Reading app, you can't (no longer?) do it from the file manager. Instead, click the hamburger menu in the app > device memory > select books > click upload arrow.] (JT 6.3: not sure what we're looking for here. Video doesn't show in epubs we make. I did add them, and they look about as expected in the one kind of preview that makes them. Also in Cool Reader. Simply Reading by Daisy is no longer on play store.)

Instead, click the hamburger menu in the app > device memory > select books > click upload arrow.] (JT 6.3: not sure what we're looking for here. Video doesn't show in epubs we make. properties.Test Case: Test trim. As you drag the "end" control, you should see the last frame change, ... same for the "start" control. Save the BloomPUB and then unzip it. The length of the video should reflect the trimmed length.
properties.Steps: Test trim. As you drag the "end" control, you should see the last frame change, ... same for the "start" control. Save the BloomPUB and then unzip it. The length of the video should reflect the trimmed length.
